name: Entenmann's Apple Crumb Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet.
2. Pare, core, and slice apples to 1/2-inch pieces.
3. Add apples to the melted butter and cook, stirring for 8 minutes until tender.
4. Stir in sugar, lemon peel, cinnamon, mace, and currants. Cook for an additional 15 minutes, stirring until thickened.
5. Cool completely.
6. In a large bowl, combine 1 cup of flour, sugar, salt, and yeast.
7. In a small saucepan, heat water and butter on low flame until it reaches 120°F (49°C).
8. Gradually add the hot liquid mixture to the dry ingredients.
9. Beat in egg, lemon peel, and 3/4 cup of flour.
10. With a mixer, beat for an additional 2 minutes.
11. Add the remaining flour and stir in cinnamon.
12. Cover and let rest for 20 minutes.
13. Grease two baking sheets with butter.
14. Place half the dough on a well-floured work surface and roll it out to 14" x 12".
15. Place the rolled-out dough on one of the prepared baking sheets.
16. Spread half the filling lengthwise down the center of the dough, starting about 3/4-inch from the edge.
17. Cut 1-inch wide diagonal strips from the filling towards the edges of the dough.
18. Fold opposite strips of dough at angles across the filling.
19. Fold the ends over the filling.
20. Brush a large piece of waxed paper with vegetable oil and loosely cover one baking sheet.
21. Top with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 hours.
22. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
23. Combine the remaining ingredients for topping.
24. Sprinkle over the loaves.
25. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until lightly browned.
26. Remove from the sheet and let cool.
